mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD b JOIN MEMBER m ON b.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID
(b.BOARD_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.MEMBER_LOGINID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD b JOIN MEMBER m ON b.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID
b.BOARD_CATEGORY = #{category} AND ( b.BOARD_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.MEMBER_LOGINID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

SELECT b.BOARD_ID, b.BOARD_CATEGORY, b.BOARD_TITLE, b.BOARD_CONTENT, b.BOARD_HIT, b.BOARD_DATE, b.MEMBER_ID, m.MEMBER_LOGINID FROM BOARD b JOIN MEMBER m ON b.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID WHERE b.BOARD_ID = #{boardId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOARD(BOARD_TITLE, BOARD_CONTENT, BOARD_CATEGORY, MEMBER_ID) VALUES(#{boardTitle}, #{boardContent}, #{boardCategory}, #{memberId})
